body.title: agent_datacenter: restart loop protection — N failures in window triggers auto-block
body.result: RestartGuard in agent_datacenter/skeleton/restart_guard.py. Sliding window, auto-block after N failures. block_type='auto', blocked_since timestamp. clear() on successful restart. All tests pass.
body.description:
Prevent runaway restart loops by auto-blocking a device after N failures within a time window. Auto-block is distinct from manual block — surfaced differently.

Proposed shape:
- agent_datacenter/skeleton/restart_guard.py:
  class RestartGuard:
    def record_failure(self, device_id: str) -> None:
      # append timestamp to failure_log[device_id]
      # prune entries older than restart_window_seconds
    def should_auto_block(self, device_id: str, config: DeviceConfig) -> bool:
      # count failures in window; return True if >= max_restart_failures
    def auto_block(self, device_id: str) -> None:
      # update registry: status='blocked', block_type='auto', blocked_at=now, reason='restart loop'
  Integrated into Skeleton.restart_device(): calls record_failure() on each restart attempt; calls should_auto_block() before next attempt
  Auto-block requires manual unblock (agentctl unblock {device_id} or rack.unblock MCP call)
  Health endpoint reports: block_type: 'auto' | 'manual' | None

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/skeleton/restart_guard.py (new)
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/skeleton/skeleton.py (restart_device integration)

Design rules:
- oop-first: RestartGuard class, not inline logic in skeleton.py
- docs-in-code: comment distinguishing auto-block from manual block

Scope boundary:
IN: failure recording, window-based count, auto-block trigger, block_type field in registry
OUT: manual block/unblock command (T-adc-access-control-stub covers block/halt ACL)

Test plan:
- 3 failures in 60s → auto_block() called; device status='blocked', block_type='auto'
- 2 failures in 60s, 1 failure at 61s → not auto-blocked (window slides)
- Auto-blocked device: Skeleton.restart_device() refuses without manual unblock
